top_signals.title: Girl group Hana channels positivity into every performance
top_signals.summary: Before joining Hana, the group's members were told "no" by the entertainment industry. Now they're part of one of Japan's most talked-about new acts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
